name: Lead Source Effectiveness
description: Know which lead source produces qualified pipeline, not just lead volume, and which channels are expensive noise.
alsoSurfaces: Which lead sources convert MQL → SQL at above-average rates?
Where is volume cheap but quality terrible?
How do enterprise sources compare to mid-market on close rate?
Which sources should we feed and which should we starve?
beforeWeRun: Source field: Salesforce Lead Source, HubSpot Original Source, or both?
Quality threshold: MQL, SQL, or pipeline stage?
Window: last 90 days or trailing 12 months?

whatYoullGet.name: Source quality KPIs
whatYoullGet.desc: Per-source MQL %, SQL %, win rate, average deal size.

whatYoullGet.name: Cost-per-qualified-lead
whatYoullGet.desc: Where applicable, source CPL × conversion = effective cost.

whatYoullGet.name: Volume vs. quality matrix
whatYoullGet.desc: Two-axis view: volume on X, conversion rate on Y.

callout: 2 quick inputs, then Sage builds your source dashboard in ~9 min.
